articles.title: Jamie Dimon Says Anthropic’s Mythos Access Debate Is a Warning Sign for AI’s Future
articles.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. CEO Jamie Dimon warned that the risks stemming from Anthropic’s Mythos AI model are a “real issue."
articles.content:
Anthropic has found itself at the center of debate over how governments should manage cybersecurity risks posed by powerful AI models.
Anthropic has since added more companies to the project, expanding its access to approximately 150 new organization... [1496 chars]

articles.title: Quebec and Alberta plan to work together to integrate AI in government
articles.description: MONTREAL — The Quebec and Alberta governments plan to work together to implement artificial intelligence in public administration, which Quebec's cybersecurity minister says will help both provinces build on each other's experience to develop new too

articles.title: AI Music App Suno Got Hacked, Giving a Glimpse of Just How Much Music It Scraped
articles.description: That's a lot of artists not getting paid.
articles.content: AI models tend to be black boxes, but it seems they do become a little less opaque if you forcibly crack them open. According to a report from 404 Media, a hacker who allegedly breached AI music generation platform Suno back in November 2025 was able... [4231 chars]

articles.title: xAI sues user for exploiting AI tool to sexualise minors
articles.description: Lawsuit accuses Terry Harwood of misusing xAI to bypass safeguards and produce explicit deepfakes involving minors.
articles.content:
Elon Musk’s xAI has filed a lawsuit against a South Carolina man who was arrested earlier this year on charges of sexually exploiting minors, alleging that he misused the company’s AI tool to create sexually explicit content involving a child.
The la... [2838 chars]

articles.title: Suno AI music was trained on 2M+ scraped YouTube songs
articles.description: A hack of Suno AI music exposed its source code, showing it scraped millions of songs from YouTube, Deezer, and Genius to train its song generator.
articles.content:
For years, musicians have said AI song generators fed on their work without asking. A hacker just opened the black box and showed them exactly how.
Leaked source code from Suno, one of the biggest AI music tools, tells the story. It trained its model... [2208 chars]

articles.title: Elon Musk Just Ditched His Clean‑Energy Image With a Billion‑Dollar Fossil‑Fuel Play
articles.description: Elon Musk's space and AI company has quietly bought a fossil fuel company.
articles.content: When it comes to Elon Musk, the world’s richest person is well-known for clean energy initiatives that include bets on electric vehicles, solar power, energy storage and more. These days, Musk is having to turn to fossil fuels to help power his AI am... [1320 chars]

articles.title: Enterprise agents drive AI growth in AWS Marketplace
articles.description: Enterprise agents are reshaping AWS Marketplace as AI-assisted listings and agentic AI adoption surge, AWS VP Matt Yanchyshyn explains.
articles.content:
Product listings in AWS Marketplace gained new AI-based features last month in anticipation of continued growth in the use of enterprise agents.
Amazon Web Services Inc. unveiled AI-assisted product listings in Product Assistant chat, a feature that ... [2559 chars]

articles.title: OpenAI Just Launched Its First Hardware Product-and It’s a Tiny Keyboard for Bossing Around AI Agents
articles.description: The AI company teamed up with Work Louder on a programmable keyboard designed specifically for Codex.
articles.content:
OpenAI has officially rolled out its first piece of hardware, and it’s not the one you’re thinking of.
The company behind ChatGPT announced on Wednesday a $230 mini keyboard designed specifically to work with its AI coding agent, Codesx. The device i... [2432 chars]

articles.title: Authors, publishers sue Google over alleged AI copyright infringement
articles.description: Hachette and Elsevier lead US legal action against Google, alleging misuse of books for Gemini AI model training.
